## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New tool / feature

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally in the browser (and backend, if touched)
- [ ] `node --check js/app.js` passes
- [ ] Follows existing code style; no unnecessary new dependencies
- [ ] User-injected HTML is sanitized (DOMPurify)
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior changed
